profile_summary.subtitle: Senior AI & Software Engineer
profile_summary.summary: This is a concise snapshot of my profile: backend, AI, production systems, performance, scalability, and engineering reliability.

exceptional_work.label: About Me in Brief
exceptional_work.text: For 15+ years I have been building AI-driven products and backend systems for real businesses: from architecture and API design to production deployment, performance tuning, and operations under load. Key work includes an AI financial assistant that scaled to 1M+ users, backend systems in Python/FastAPI/PostgreSQL/AWS, NLP/ML modules for intent handling and forecasting, and continuous refinement of AI-generated code: fixing logic issues, removing hallucinated APIs, hardening reliability, and improving latency.

form.title: Core Expertise
form.description: The main areas where I have the strongest engineering depth.
items: Python as the primary engineering language
TypeScript for full-stack development and internal tooling
LLM/NLP, AI agents, backend architecture, code quality

cv.title: What I Build

items: AI products and automation systems for real users
Internal tools for code analysis, debugging, and improvement

cover_letter.title: Engineering Focus
cover_letter.description: The principles I apply when building and maintaining production systems.
items: Correctness and root-cause fixes instead of surface patches
Debugging complex business logic and AI-generated output
Performance, caching, async pipelines, and reliability

next_steps.title: Why Teams Work With Me
next_steps.description: What is usually valued in me as an engineer and technical partner.
items: I turn rough AI output into production-grade results
I work at the intersection of backend engineering, AI, and product thinking
I have experience with real scale and high-volume systems
I optimize for speed, quality of execution, and measurable impact

neira.description: Designing AI agents and Python/FastAPI backend services for sales, HR, marketing, and internal operations. Main focus: orchestration, integrations, real-time inference, execution reliability, and refining LLM-generated logic into production-grade systems.

aisales.description: Led engineering for an AI financial assistant that scaled to 1M+ users. Built production backend systems in Python/FastAPI/PostgreSQL/AWS, reduced latency through async pipelines and caching, and maintained high availability. Developed NLP/ML modules for intent handling and forecasting, improving prediction accuracy by 25-40%.
